# Tuning Note Template

Use this template for files under `docs/tuning/`.

---
Status: Draft
---

## Knob

What setting(s) this note is about and what they control.

## When It Helps

- (situations + symptoms)

## When It Hurts

- (tradeoffs + failure modes)

## Validation

- What to check in Spark UI (Stages/SQL/Executors)
- What metric should move and in what direction

## Real Use Case

Symptom → evidence → change → outcome → guardrail.
